---
title: "Blog"
description: "Short writing on fiscal policy, behavioural economics, AI and methods — in English or Spanish, depending on the audience."
keywords: "fiscal policy blog, behavioural economics, AI economics, public finance notes, Gonzalo Llamosas"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

This blog collects shorter writing on the topics I work on. Posts may be in **English** or **Spanish**, depending on the audience and the source of the argument. Use the categories below to filter.
